summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture highlights a scorching Scarlet > Fire and a smoking Help‑Slip‑Franklin’s sequence, making this one of ’95’s most praised shows.
review: The SBD source delivers an exceptionally clean mix with Jerry Garcia’s guitar front‑and‑center and very little keyboard clutter. Musically the concert shines on the second‑set highlights—Help > Slip > Franklin’s, Scarlet > Fire, Eternity and a lush Space jam—while the first set maintains solid flow despite a few mixed feelings about certain songs. Overall the performance is regarded as one of the strongest from the 1995 tour.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews (7/9) award 4‑5 stars and praise both the soundboard quality and several standout performances; only a few low‑star comments focus on personal taste or keyboard issues, so the combined show (70%) and recording (30%) rating is strong.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note a crisp, front‑heavy guitar mix and overall clean sound; occasional complaints about Vince’s keyboard tone do not detract from the generally superb SBD fidelity.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
poor_songs: Dark Star (absence noted as a disappointment)
show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is praised for its solid pacing, with an especially powerful second set; some reviewers wished for a different climax (Dark Star) but overall the flow from opening through UJB, Stella Blue and the extended jams feels cohesive.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s playing is described as ‘on fire’, crisp, emotionally charged, with standout vocals on Fire and Stella.
band_member_comments.Phil: Only a brief mention of Phil hinting at Dark Star; otherwise no specific comments.
band_member_comments.Bob: Mixed – praised for vocal moments in Fire but criticized by one reviewer for steering the jam into Eternity instead of Dark Star.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keyboards receive the most criticism: Vince’s tone called ‘unlistenable’ and overly cheesy, though another reviewer notes limited MIDI/cheesy effects.
